Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Marco-Home\\Documents\\Prova-main\\Prova-main\\backend" && python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('bustapaga.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('SELECT data, ora_entrata, ora_uscita, marcature FROM timbrature ORDER BY data DESC'\)
rows = cur.fetchall\(\)
print\(f'Timbrature trovate: {len\(rows\)}'\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f'  {r[0]} | entrata: {r[1]} | uscita: {r[2]} | marcature: {r[3][:80]}'\)
conn.close\(\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\Marco-Home\\Documents\\Prova-main\\Prova-main\\backend" && python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('bustapaga.db'\)
cur = conn.cursor\(\)
cur.execute\('DELETE FROM timbrature'\)
conn.commit\(\)
count = cur.rowcount
print\(f'Eliminate {count} timbrature.'\)
cur.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM timbrature'\)
print\(f'Rimaste: {cur.fetchone\(\)[0]}'\)
conn.close\(\)
")
